source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And that's my little brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: That's Mummy Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: That's Daddy Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: syut3
cards.english: [Snow]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: tung4 gam1 jat6 fei1 soeng4 zi1 hing1 fan5
cards.english: Peppa and George are very excited today

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 ceot1 bin6 lok6 gan2 syut3 laa3
cards.english: Because it's snowing outside

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 媽咪，我哋可以出去玩雪嗎？
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 ceot1 heoi3 waan2 syut3 maa1
cards.english: Mummy, can we go out and play in the snow?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 可以，但係出便好凍㗎喎
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 daan6 hai6 ceot1 bin6 hou2 dung3 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: Yes, but it's very cold outside.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 jiu3 zoek6 gau3 saam1 sin1 dak1 gaa4
cards.english: You guys have to wear enough clothes first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 你哋唔好唔記得戴帽、頸巾同手襪啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 m4 hou2 m4 gei3 dak1 daai3 mou2 geng2 gan1 tung4 sau2 mat6 aa3
cards.english: Don't forget to wear hats, scarves, and gloves.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 ceot1 bin6 fei1 soeng4 zi1 dung3
cards.english: Because it's extremely cold outside.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: so2 ji5 tung4 jat1 ding6 jiu3 daai3 mou2
cards.english: So Peppa and George must wear hats.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: laam6 geng2 gan1
cards.english: Put on scarves.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: tung4 daai3 sau2 mat6
cards.english: And wear gloves.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: lai4 laa1
cards.english: Come on, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: Peppa同George喺雪地上便留低腳印
cards.jyutping: tung4 hai2 syut3 dei6 soeng6 bin6 lau4 dai1 goek3 jan3
cards.english: Peppa and George left footprints on the snow.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: Peppa同George 好鍾意喺雪地上便留低腳印
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 syut3 dei6 soeng6 bin6 lau4 dai1 goek3 jan3
cards.english: Peppa and George love to leave footprints in the snow.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: juk1 bai6 laa3
cards.english: Oh dear.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: jat1 di1 dou1 m4 hou2 siu3
cards.english: It's not funny at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 ngo5 dei6 waan2 syut3 kau4 aa1
cards.english: George, why don't we play with snowballs?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: zing2 zo2 jat1 go3 syut3 kau4
cards.english: Peppa made a snowball.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: tung4 waan2 dak1 hou2 hoi1 sam1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa and George are having so much fun.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: George，你呢隻豬仔快啲返嚟啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 ne1 zek3 zyu1 zai2 faai3 di1 faan2 lai2 aa3
cards.english: George, you little piggy, come back here quickly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: caam2 laa3
cards.english: Oh no.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 睇嚟佢哋玩得好似過份咗啲喇
cards.jyutping: tai2 lai4 keoi5 dei6 waan2 dak1 hou2 ci5 gwo3 fan6 zo2 di1 laa3
cards.english: Looks like they've gotten a little carried away.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3
cards.english: Sorry.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 lai4 cai3 syut3 jan4 laa1
cards.english: George, let's build a snowman

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: tung4 hoi1 ci2 cai3 syut3 jan4
cards.english: Peppa and George are starting to build a snowman

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 hai6 syut3 jan4 ge3 san1 tai2
cards.english: First is the snowman's body

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: George，呢個就係雪人嘅身體嘞
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 zau6 hai6 syut3 jan4 ge3 san1 tai2 laak3
cards.english: George, this is the snowman's body

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 keoi5 dei6 zing2 syut3 jan4 go3 tau4
cards.english: Now they are making the snowman's head

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 而家就爭對手、對眼同埋個口啊
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 zau6 zang1 deoi3 sau2 deoi3 ngaan5 tung4 maai4 go3 hau2 aa3
cards.english: Now all it needs are arms, eyes, and a mouth

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: George揾到一啲樹枝嚟做雪人對手
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 jat1 di1 syu6 zi1 lai4 zou6 syut3 jan4 deoi3 sau2
cards.english: George found some branches to use as the snowman's arms

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: Peppa就揾到啲石仔嚟做雪人對眼同個口
cards.jyutping: zau6 wan2 dou3 di1 sek6 zai2 lai4 zou6 syut3 jan4 deoi3 ngaan5 tung4 go3 hau2
cards.english: Peppa found some pebbles to use as the snowman's eyes and mouth

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 zau6 hai6 keoi5 go3 joeng6 laak3
cards.english: This is its face

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 而家個雪人仲爭個鼻啊
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 go3 syut3 jan4 zung6 zang1 go3 bei6 aa3
cards.english: Now the snowman is missing a nose

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 go3 hung4 lo4 baak6
cards.english: Peppa found a carrot.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: jung6 lai4 zou6 syut3 jan4 go3 bei6 aa3
cards.english: To use as the snowman's nose.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: syut3 jan4 tai2 lok6 fei1 soeng4 hoi1 sam1
cards.english: The snowman looks very happy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 但係佢可能會覺得凍喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 keoi5 ho2 nang4 wui6 gok3 dak1 dung3 wo3
cards.english: But he might be feeling cold.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 個雪人要着返啲衫幫佢保暖喇
cards.jyutping: go3 syut3 jan4 jiu3 zoek6 faan1 di1 saam1 bong1 keoi5 bou2 nyun5 laa3
cards.english: The snowman needs to put on some clothes to keep him warm.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: George揾到啲衫嚟幫雪人保暖
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 di1 saam1 lai4 bong1 syut3 jan4 bou2 nyun5
cards.english: George found some clothes to help keep the snowman warm.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: syut3 jan4 daai3 zo2 ding2 mou2
cards.english: The snowman is wearing a hat.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: laam6 zo2 geng2 gan1
cards.english: And a scarf.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: zung6 daai3 maai4 sau2 mat6
cards.english: And even gloves.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 de1 di4 ceot1 lei4 tai2 haa6 aa1
cards.english: Mommy, Daddy, come out and take a look.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 豬太太都戴咗帽、頸巾同埋手襪
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 dou1 daai3 zo2 mou6 geng2 gan1 tung4 maai4 sau2 mat6
cards.english: Mrs. Pig is wearing a hat, scarf, and gloves too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 呢一個係我見過最完美嘅雪人嚟啊
cards.jyutping: ne1 jat1 go3 hai6 ngo5 gin3 gwo3 zeoi3 jyun4 mei5 ge3 syut3 jan4 lai4 aa3
cards.english: This is the most perfect snowman I've ever seen.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 tai2 lok6 hou2 dung3 wo3
cards.english: Mr. Pig looks very cold.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 佢冇戴到帽、頸巾同埋手襪
cards.jyutping: keoi5 mou5 daai3 dou3 mou6 geng2 gan1 tung4 maai4 sau2 mat6
cards.english: He isn't wearing a hat, scarf, or gloves.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 爹哋，點解你冇帶到嚟頂帽
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 dim2 gaai2 nei5 mou5 daai3 dou3 lai4 ding2 mou2
cards.english: Daddy, why didn't you bring your hat?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: laam6 geng2 gan1 tung4 daai3 sau2 mat6 ge2
cards.english: And a scarf and gloves?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 我周圍都揾唔到佢哋啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau1 wai4 dou1 wan2 m4 dou3 keoi5 dei6 aa3
cards.english: I can't find them anywhere.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji5 ging1 wan2 gwo3 saai3 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: I've already looked everywhere.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 我諗我知道爹哋頂帽、頸巾同手襪喺邊喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ngo5 zi1 dou3 de1 dei6 ding2 mou2 geng2 gan1 tung4 sau2 mat6 hai2 bin1 laa3
cards.english: I think I know where Daddy's hat, scarf, and gloves are.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.characters: 豬先生嘅帽、頸巾同埋手襪
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 ge3 mou6 geng2 gan1 tung4 maai4 sau2 mat6
cards.english: Mr. Pig's hat, scarf, and gloves.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E26 Snow［雪］
cards.jyutping: dou1 hai2 saai3 syut3 jan4 san1 soeng6 laa3
cards.english: They're all on the snowman.
